name: Conseil
description: Conseil, the meticulous and loyal assistant, is rendered with a palette of cool greens, greys, and soft browns, reflecting his pragmatic nature and deep connection to the natural world. His face, framed by neatly parted, dark brown hair perpetually threatening to stray forward, is dominated by wide, intelligent eyes of a gentle grey-green. A slightly crooked nose, hinting at a childhood mishap, and a thin, almost apologetic mouth, give him an air of quiet contemplation. His clothing is always practical and well-worn: a high-necked, faded green linen shirt buttoned to the collar, beneath a sleeveless, dark grey wool vest adorned with numerous pockets containing botanical tools. He favors sturdy, brown corduroy trousers tucked into ankle-high, leather work boots, suggesting an enduring preparedness for fieldwork. A leather strap, worn diagonally across his chest, secures a magnifying glass and a small, leather-bound notebook, further emphasizing his scholarly dedication.
